title: Pronami Tomay
desc: A couple's dreams of a life together are crushed when one of them marries someone else.

title: Rakhe Hari Mare Ke
desc: After being jailed an honest man learns about his twin brother who is an humble policeman.

title: Tulkalam
desc: Honest, hard-working villagers fight against the forces of industrialisation.

title: Naga Panchami
desc: A shape-shifting snake is determined to avenge her mother's untimely death.

title: Premer Kahini
desc: At a wedding, a man gets a shock when the bride turns out to be a girl he loves.

title: Kencho Khunrte Keute
desc: Parama is disciplined by a will requiring her to marry for full inheritance.

title: Titli
desc: Titli's life changes when she accidentally meets the superstar she loves.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Lord Shiva presents a graceful dance performance to alleviate all of Parvati's concerns. S01 E107.

title: Ei Prithobi Tomar Amar
desc: Shibu rescues Purnima, leading to unexpected dangers and a fight for survival.

title: Jhinuk Mala
desc: Sujan and Sakhi want to marry each other, but Sakhi's stepmother thwarts their plans.

title: Badsha: The Don
desc: A man who aspires to become a gangster arrives in London and falls in love with a woman.

title: MLA Phatakesto
desc: A goon aspires to become a politician and gives himself seven days to achieve his dream.

title: Premi
desc: Based on the film 'Nee Sneham' M. S. Raju.

title: Bidhilipi
desc: Bablu falls in love with Minu without realising she is in love with Alok.

title: Bojhena Shey Bojhena
desc: Four lives intersect through love and loss, marked by a life-altering accident.

title: Prem Tame
desc: 'Prem Tame' follows Pablo's romantic journey. He moves from fleeting infatuation to genuine affection. Ultimately, he finds love not in a person, but unexpectedly, in a puppy.

title: Shiv Shakti
desc: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati fulfil their duties together while sacrificing and caring for humanity.

title: Premer Pratidan
desc: Sandip chases love in Shimla, but their joy quickly fades away.

title: Sansar Sangram
desc: Anand, forced to quit studies, faces hardships as he strives to support his family after his father's death.
